src/main/java/redis/embedded/IRedisServe.general_idea: Changed the return type of the ports method from List to Set to better represent a collection of unique ports.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisBunch..general_idea: Change return type of port collection methods from List to Set to ensure uniqueness of port numbers.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisBunch..human_impl: public Set<Integer> ports() { Set<Integer> ports = new LinkedHashSet<>(); ... }

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisBunchB.general_idea: Replace deprecated slaveOf method with replicaOf to align with modern Redis terminology.
Change port collection parameters from Collection to Set to enforce uniqueness.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.general_idea: Inject RedisClient into RedisCluster to manage client lifecycle alongside servers.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.human_impl: private final RedisClient redisClient; ... RedisCluster(List<RedisServer> redisServers, RedisClient redisClient)

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.general_idea: Invoke redisClient.run() during cluster start to ensure the client is active.
Rename servers() to nodes() to better reflect cluster terminology.
Rename serverPorts() to nodePorts() to align with the nodes() naming convention.
Change ports() return type from List<Integer> to Set<Integer> to prevent duplicates and use LinkedHashSet.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.human_impl: public Set<Integer> ports() { return new LinkedHashSet<>(nodePorts()); }

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.general_idea: Replace the legacy master-slave replication group model with a modern Redis Cluster node-based model.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.human_impl: Replaced List<ReplicationGroup> and PortProvider logic with Set<Integer> nodePorts and clusterReplicas fields.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.general_idea: Integrate a dedicated RedisClientBuilder to manage client-side cluster configuration.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.human_impl: Added private RedisClientBuilder field and withClientBuilder method.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.general_idea: Rewrite the build process to instantiate servers with cluster enablement and construct a RedisClient.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.human_impl: Modified buildServers to iterate nodePorts with clusterEnable(true) and added buildClient method.

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.general_idea: Adapt the RedisCluster instantiation to accept the new client object alongside servers.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisCluste.human_impl: Changed new RedisCluster(servers) to new RedisCluster(servers, client).

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisSentin.general_idea: Changed the superclass from AbstractRedisInstance to AbstractRedisServerInstance to align with a refactored inheritance hierarchy.
Removed public constructors that manually initialized args and logged debug messages, likely due to deprecation or consolidation in the parent class.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisSentin.human_impl: Removed public RedisSentinel() and public RedisSentinel(int, int) constructors

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisSentin.general_idea: Updated the remaining constructor to pass arguments to the new parent class constructor and changed visibility to package-private.
src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisSentin.human_impl: RedisSentinel(List<String> args, int sentinelPort) { super(args, sentinelPort, ...); }

src/main/java/redis/embedded/RedisSentin.general_idea: Renamed the overridden method to match the new signature in the parent class.
